subject: Fix "fake" deployment image name
commit_message:
Fix "fake" deployment image name

Change-Id: Iaf5ca63623a72e46f54911c07626da2d145a5762
Issue-ID: OOM-2588
Signed-off-by: Bartek Grzybowski <b.grzybowski@partner.samsung.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 19 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

Huge thanks fir the fix! As this is never tested outside if offline-installer let's go ahead and merge
Change has been successfully merged by Krzysztof Opasiak

Patch Set 1:

> 
> Huge thanks fir the fix! As this is never tested outside if offline-installer let's go ahead and merge

Started adding support for fake deployment in offline-installer hence I discovered this. Thx for quick response.
